title: NBB Recruitment 2026 - Apply Offline for Consultant, Technical Assistant Posts
shortInfo: National Bee Board (NBB) Consultant & Technical Assistant Notification 2026 has been released on 13 May 2026 on the official website www.nbb.gov.in. A total of 3 vacancies have been announced through the NBB Consultant & Technical Assistant Recruitment 2026. Candidates up to 60 years (Consultant) and up to 45 years (Technical Assistant) who have Master’s Degree in Agriculture / Horticulture / Entomology / Apiculture and allied subjects are eligible to apply for these vacancies. The offline application process for NBB Consultant & Technical Assistant Recruitment 2026 has started and will remain

basic_details.job_title: NBB Recruitment 2026 - Apply Offline for Consultant, Technical Assistant Posts
basic_details.short_information: National Bee Board (NBB) Consultant & Technical Assistant Notification 2026 has been released on 13 May 2026 on the official website www.nbb.gov.in. A total of 3 vacancies have been announced through the NBB Consultant & Technical Assistant Recruitment 2026. Candidates up to 60 years (Consultant) and up to 45 years (Technical Assistant) who have Master’s Degree in Agriculture / Horticulture / Entomology / Apiculture and allied subjects are eligible to apply for these vacancies. The offline application process for NBB Consultant & Technical Assistant Recruitment 2026 has started and will remain

age_limit.age_details: Max 60 years for Consultant, Max 45 years for Technical Assistant (Relaxable for experts)
age_limit.details: Maximum age limit for Consultant is 60 years as on 30th April, 2026. Maximum age limit for Technical Assistant is 45 years as on 30th April, 2026. Age relaxation is applicable for experts with proven domain expertise and experience of working in beekeeping/ agriculture/ horticulture/ extension/ computer, etc. in Government/ public sector organizations.

qualification.education_qualification: Master’s Degree in Agriculture / Horticulture / Entomology / Apiculture and allied subjects
qualification.details: Consultant: Master Degree in Agriculture/ Horticulture/ Entomology/ Apiculture and allied subjects with First Division or 60% marks or equivalent overall grade points average with 02 years experience in Project formulation, execution, implementation, extension/ management of Government schemes/ programmes/ missions and consultancy in the requisite field. Desirable: Doctorate in relevant subjects, Good knowledge of Computer/ using ICT base tools, MIS portal and applications for management of Government programmes, hand on experience in beekeeping / Apiculture. Technical Assistant: Masters Degree in Agriculture/ Horticulture/ Entomology/ Apiculture and allied subjects with minimum 1 year experience in the relevant field preferred.

salary_details.details: Consultant: Rs. 40,000/- - Rs. 65,000/- Per Month Technical Assistant: Rs. 40,000/- - Rs. 65,000/- Per Month

selection_process: Shortlisting of applications Personal interview before a Selection Committee Final selection purely on performance/merit basis
how_to_apply: Candidates who wish to apply for NBB Various Posts Recruitment 2026 through offline mode should follow the steps below.
Read the official notification carefully before applying.
Download the application form from the official website: .
Fill the application form carefully with correct information.
Attach self-attested copies of required documents such as photograph, signature, ID proof, and certificates.
Check all details carefully before submission.
Send the completed application form to the address mentioned in the notification through Speed Post / Registered Post or as instructed.
Ensure the application reaches before the last date: 28-05-2026.
Keep a photocopy of the submitted application form for future reference.

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for NBB Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: The last date to submit applications for the National Bee Board Recruitment 2026 is 28th May 2026. Ensure your application reaches the specified address before this date.

faq.question: Q2. How many vacancies are available in NBB Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: A total of 3 vacancies are available for the posts of Consultant and Technical Assistant in the National Bee Board Recruitment 2026.

faq.question: Q3. What is the educational qualification required for the Consultant post?
faq.answer: For the Consultant post, candidates need a Master's Degree in Agriculture/ Horticulture/ Entomology/ Apiculture or allied subjects with 2 years of relevant experience. A Doctorate degree is desirable.

faq.question: Q4. What is the age limit for the Technical Assistant post?
faq.answer: The maximum age limit for the Technical Assistant post is 45 years as on 30th April 2026. Age relaxation may be provided for experts.

faq.question: Q5. Is there any application fee for NBB Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: No, there is no application fee mentioned for any category (General/OBC, SC/ST) for the NBB Recruitment 2026.

faq.question: Q6. What is the salary offered for these posts?
faq.answer: The salary offered for both Consultant and Technical Assistant posts ranges from Rs. 40,000/- to Rs. 65,000/- per month.

faq.question: Q7. How will candidates be selected for the NBB posts?
faq.answer: The selection process involves shortlisting of applications followed by a personal interview before a Selection Committee. Final selection is based on merit.

faq.question: Q8. What is the application mode for NBB Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: The application mode for NBB Recruitment 2026 is offline. Candidates need to send their applications by post.

faq.question: Q9. Where can I find the official notification for NBB Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: The official notification PDF can be accessed through the 'Important Links' section on this page by clicking the provided link.

faq.question: Q10. What is the location of the National Bee Board?
faq.answer: The National Bee Board is located in New Delhi, Delhi, with the pincode 110001.
